body_paragraphs: I'm writing to express strong interest in the {{role}} role at {{company}}. Your work on {{mission_keywords}} maps closely to what I've spent the last several years building.

At Acme Cloud I led a billing-service migration that cut p99 latency 60% by moving from a synchronous monolith to event-sourced microservices. I'm comfortable owning a service end-to-end — from schema and API design through on-call ergonomics.
I'd love to talk through how my background in {{skills}} fits the team. Thanks for your time.
